coreJobStatement: Provide safe, integrated residential accommodation and healthcare services across a continuum of care levels to older adults, enabling aging in place with progressively intensive clinical support as functional needs evolve.

l6Systems.name: Resident Intake & Care Planning
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assess functional status and establish individualized care plan for each incoming resident

l6Systems.name: Independent Living Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide residential amenities, social programming, and wellness services to functionally independent older adults

l6Systems.name: Assisted Living Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deliver personal care assistance, medication management, and ADL support to residents needing moderate daily help

l6Systems.name: Memory Care Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide secured residential care and specialized behavioral programming for residents with dementia and cognitive impairment

l6Systems.name: Skilled Nursing Care
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deliver 24-hour clinical nursing, physician oversight, and complex medical management for residents with intensive health needs

l6Systems.name: Rehabilitation Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Restore and maintain physical, occupational, and speech function through therapeutic interventions

l6Systems.name: Care Transition Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Coordinate resident transfers between care levels and to/from external facilities

l6Systems.name: Facility Safety & Emergency Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Protect residents, staff, and assets from safety incidents at all times

l6Systems.name: Nutrition & Food Service
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deliver nutritionally appropriate meals and hydration across all care levels

l6Systems.name: Regulatory Compliance & Quality Assurance
l6Systems.jobFamily: Ensure clinical, operational, and regulatory compliance with CMS, state licensing, and CARF standards

l6Systems.name: Resident Information Systems
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain accurate resident health records and operational data across all care processes

vnUnits.name: EHR Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Integrated electronic health record system managing clinical documentation, medication administration, care planning, and billing

vnUnits.name: Clinical Assessment Tools (MDS 3.0 / ADL scoring)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Standardized instruments for evaluating resident functional status, cognitive level, and care needs at intake and periodically

vnUnits.name: Resident Engagement Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Digital platform for scheduling social activities, wellness programming, and community engagement for independent living residents

vnUnits.name: Smart Home / Ambient Monitoring
vnUnits.functionalJob: In-unit sensor and alert systems passively monitoring resident activity patterns and triggering emergency response when anomalies are detected

vnUnits.name: Nurse Call & Emergency Response
vnUnits.functionalJob: Resident-activated alert system enabling rapid staff response to emergencies across care areas

vnUnits.name: Medication Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Systems for secure storage, dispensing, administration tracking, and drug-interaction checking of resident medications

vnUnits.name: Wander Prevention & Exit Security
vnUnits.functionalJob: Systems detecting and alerting to at-risk resident proximity to or use of exit doors, preventing elopement while maintaining fire-code-compliant escape

alternatives.name: RFID/BLE wander management (Stanley Healthcare / Securitas Healthcare, CenTrak)
Emergency exit door alarm guards with IoT monitoring ← Türwächter

vnUnits.name: Secured Perimeter Door Hardware
vnUnits.functionalJob: Physical door locking and access control hardware securing the memory care unit perimeter against unauthorized egress per CMS Life Safety Code

alternatives.name: Electromagnetic delayed-egress locks
alternatives.source: CMS Life Safety Code §19.2.2.2 permits delayed-egress in AL/MC

alternatives.name: Alarmed exit bars / crash bars with alarm

vnUnits.name: Cognitive Stimulation & Sensory Technology
vnUnits.functionalJob: Technology and equipment delivering therapeutic cognitive stimulation and sensory engagement for residents with dementia

vnUnits.name: Patient Monitoring Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Bedside and mobile devices for continuous or periodic measurement of vital signs in skilled nursing residents

vnUnits.name: IV & Infusion Therapy Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Pumps and administration sets for controlled intravenous delivery of medications and fluids to skilled nursing residents

vnUnits.name: Rehabilitation Management Software
vnUnits.functionalJob: Software for scheduling, documenting, and billing physical, occupational, and speech therapy sessions

vnUnits.name: Physical & Occupational Therapy Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Therapeutic tables, exercise devices, and assistive equipment for restoring and maintaining resident functional mobility

vnUnits.name: Care Coordination Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Software managing resident transfers between care levels, discharge planning, and coordination with external facilities

vnUnits.name: Transportation Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Fleet scheduling and contracted transport services for resident transfers to medical appointments and external facilities

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Door Alarm Guards
vnUnits.functionalJob: Devices securing emergency exit doors against unauthorized use while maintaining fire-code-compliant unimpeded escape

alternatives.name: Mechanical-only alarm guards (no monitoring)
alternatives.source: Industry estimate — no published CCRC-specific split

alternatives.name: Electromagnetic delayed-egress locks
alternatives.source: CMS permits up to 30-second delay in MCUs

alternatives.name: IoT-enabled alarm guards with wireless monitoring ← Türwächter
No dedicated exit monitoring / basic door stops

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Building-wide fire detection and alarm network per NFPA 72 / EN 54; mandatory under CMS Life Safety Code

alternatives.name: Addressable fire alarm panel (Notifier, Simplex, Siemens)

vnUnits.name: Access Control & Perimeter Security
vnUnits.functionalJob: Electronic credential-based entry management for building perimeter and controlled access zones

alternatives.name: IP-based electronic access control (Assa Abloy, Honeywell)

vnUnits.name: Video Surveillance (CCTV)
vnUnits.functionalJob: IP camera network for 24/7 monitoring of common areas, perimeter, and controlled zones for resident safety and incident investigation

vnUnits.name: Emergency Communication System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Facility-wide paging, intercom, and mass notification infrastructure for emergency alerts and staff coordination

vnUnits.name: Nutrition Management Software
vnUnits.functionalJob: Software for dietary planning, menu management, and nutritional compliance tracking across resident care levels

vnUnits.name: Commercial Kitchen Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Institutional food service equipment for preparing and serving meals to residents across all care levels

vnUnits.name: Quality Management & Survey Prep
vnUnits.functionalJob: MDS-based quality measure reporting and CMS survey preparation tools for regulatory compliance

vnUnits.name: Infection Prevention & Control
vnUnits.functionalJob: Protocols, equipment, and monitoring systems for preventing healthcare-associated infections across all care areas

vnUnits.name: EHR Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Integrated electronic health record system shared across all care levels for clinical documentation and operational data

vnUnits.name: Wi-Fi & Network Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Enterprise wireless and wired network serving EHR, nurse call, security, and resident connectivity across all buildings

vnUnits.name: Resident & Family Communication Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Digital portal enabling residents and families to access care updates, activity schedules, and communicate with staff

marquardtPosition: L5 Emergency Exit Door Alarm Guards under L6H-SAF Facility Safety & Emergency Management — GfS Türwächter IoT (Exit Control 179/1125) enters as IoT-enabled alarm guard preventing unauthorized exit and resident elopement
